chunks.text: HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD Constitutional Petition No.S-580 of 2025 Present: Justice Jawad Akbar Sarwana Petitioner: Waqar Ali s/o Muhammad Azeem through Mr.Abdul Hafeez Solangi, Advocate Respondent: Mst.Fatima d/o Abdul Hafeez. Nemo. Date of hearing: 24.10.2025 Date of decision: 11.11.2025 O R D E R JAWAD AKBAR SARWANA, J: For reasons to be recorded, the above- titled petition is dismissed. JUDGE AHSAN K. ABRO
